Title: Sage Green Crewneck Tee with Celestial Pocket Print
Description:
Embrace cosmic comfort with this versatile sage green T-shirt. Featuring a subtle yet striking celestial graphic centered on the chest pocket, this shirt is designed to make a quiet statement while providing all-day wearability.

  • Unmatched Comfort: Crafted from a soft, breathable fabric that feels great whether you are spending a day at work or relaxing at home.
  • Versatile Style: The timeless crewneck fit and neutral color palette make it easy to pair with jeans, shorts, or layered over a jacket.
  • Unique Detail: The small, detailed pocket print adds a personalized, cosmic touch, transforming a basic tee into a piece of thoughtful apparel.

Whether you are looking for a cozy piece for everyday casual wear, or searching for a meaningful gift for a space enthusiast, this shirt is perfect for adding a touch of stardust to any wardrobe. It is an effortless staple that keeps comfort and unique style in balance.
